# PHIL.133 ? Fail Fast, Learn Faster

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** innovation_growth

## Core Principles
Quick failures are valuable learning opportunities

## Application
Test quickly, identify failures early, extract lessons, apply learnings, move on
